chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 24 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 229/2014. 2. For hearing of Main Petition. 17.03.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Rao Faraz Ali, Advocate for Respondent No.2. ********** None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. Perusal of the Order Sheets reflects that the Petitioner has remained absent on the last many dates. This matter has been pending for over 12 years without any significant progress. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter Accordingly, the instant JCM is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
